title: Migrate skills, memory, and docs to apply plan
description:
Migrate skills, memory, and docs to the new command and the apply-creates-the-breakdown-node model.

Update the project-lead and breakdown skills, the bracket-command memory, and the user docs; reconcile the bracket-pointer id convention; document how a project with no bracket opts in by declaring the types and a template.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] DOCS-01: No skill, memory, or doc references the removed command.
- [ ] [hard] DOCS-02: The breakdown skill reflects that the breakdown node is created by apply, not by the skill.
- [ ] [hard] DOCS-03: The bracket-pointer id convention is consistent across template, tests, and docs.
